title: LSASS Credential Dumping (Mimikatz)
description: Detects LSASS memory access (Sysmon EventID 10) consistent with Mimikatz-style credential dumping.
author: SOC Team
aql: SELECT LOGSOURCENAME(logsourceid) AS host, sourceip AS src_ip, DATEFORMAT(starttime, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss') AS event_time, UTF8(payload) AS raw_event FROM events WHERE UTF8(payload) ILIKE '%AgentLogFile=%Sysmon%' AND UTF8(payload) ILIKE '%EventID=10%' AND UTF8(payload) ILIKE '%lsass.exe%' AND ( UTF8(payload) ILIKE '%GrantedAccess=0x1010%' OR UTF8(payload) ILIKE '%GrantedAccess=0x1410%' OR UTF8(payload) ILIKE '%GrantedAccess=0x1438%' OR UTF8(payload) ILIKE '%GrantedAccess=0x143a%' OR UTF8(payload) ILIKE '%GrantedAccess=0x1fffff%' OR UTF8(payload) ILIKE '%CallTrace%UNKNOWN%' ) AND UTF8(payload) NOT ILIKE '%SourceImage=%wininit.exe%' AND UTF8(payload) NOT ILIKE '%SourceImage=%MsMpEng.exe%' ORDER BY starttime DESC LAST 10 MINUTES
